caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Actual 541213 workforce is seasonal preparers/intake, unlike 4-digit CPA-heavy role mix.
inputs.pi_dist: Free File eligibility and offerings vary; H&R Block is a major-chain proxy rather than all independents.
inputs.pi_moat: Franchise and independent client-file ownership differs.
inputs.t50_years: Not a code-level adoption census; complex work is less automated.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: No reopened NAICS adoption survey.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: Absence of evidence is not evidence of no issue.
inputs.active_consolidators: Networks need not acquire independent 541213 firms.
inputs.buy_mult: No reopened code-specific sale comparables; SDE and EBITDA differ.
inputs.exit_mult: No reopened code-specific sale comparables.
inputs.pricing_structure: H&R Block does not represent every tax preparer.

q.rationale: The existing v3 distribution-retention × moat-retention judgment is reused as a bounded Stage 1 commercial-retention proxy.

leaves.rationale: Predeclared bounded demand/operator row for the inherited v3 terminal class; unknown classes remain missing.

e.rationale: Global eligible-union share; heterogeneous records use the predeclared wider/lower class-count row.

n.detail: margin 0.1565 (margins.json[54]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Business & Consumer Services EBITDA/Sales 15.65%); revenue/employee $62,700 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 541213); class <5: 15,428 firms, avg revenue/firm $162,364 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $25,410 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 2,632 firms, avg revenue/firm $421,091 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $65,901 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 915 firms, avg revenue/firm $786,051 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $123,017 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 436 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,867,025 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $292,189 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 40 firms, avg revenue/firm $9,812,650 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,535,680 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 13 firms, avg revenue/firm $208,711,769 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $32,663,392 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 40

s5.rationale: Fixed transform of the disclosed v3 owner-age range into five-year qualifying control-transfer propensity.

a.rationale: High automation estimate for interview-driven returns and intake; supplied CPA-heavy 5412 role weights are an imperfect constraint.

l.detail: BLS Industry Productivity (IPS) direct: labor compensation (L02) $7,400.9M / sectoral output (T30) $12,593.9M, year 2022

rho.rationale: Fixed outcome-blind transform of the v3 t50 adoption estimate, widened by the declared bridge error.

source_review.summary: All deterministic mechanics and frozen digests pass, and all three registered sources are live. IRS Free File and H&R Block's filed channel, AI-assistance, franchise, and refund-product evidence support the useful conclusion that simple consumer preparation is highly automatable but offers weak capture and consolidation economics; GAO confirms Direct File is suspended. Publication requires the authored caveats because adoption above 50%, role weights, independent-firm economics, owner demographics, consolidator count, and multiples are disclosed estimates or broad proxies rather than code-level observations. No inaccessible, contradicted, or materially misrepresented score-driving evidence warrants rejection.
